description: Numeric LinkedIn organization ID. Primary key. Join to follower/page/share tables via: CAST(REPLACE(organization_entity, 'urn:li:organization:', '') AS UNSIGNED) = id
Human-readable company name (e.g. 'BlueHippo'). Use this for name-based filtering and display.
LinkedIn URL slug (e.g. 'usbluehippo'). Used in linkedin.com/company/<vanity_name>.
Company description text in the default locale.
Legal entity type: PRIVATELY_HELD, SELF_EMPLOYED, NON_PROFIT, EDUCATIONAL, etc.
Active/inactive status of the organization on LinkedIn.
Employee count band: SIZE_1, SIZE_2_TO_10, SIZE_11_TO_50, SIZE_51_TO_200, SIZE_201_TO_500, etc.
Country code of the default locale (e.g. US).
Language code of the default locale (e.g. en).
Numeric ID of the parent organization (if this is a subsidiary).
Internal LinkedIn version tag for this record.
Timestamp when Fivetran last synced this row. Internal metadata, never expose to users.
